title: Selenipedium × calurum

This unique orchid is a result of a cross between two different species of the Selenipedium genus. As a hybrid species, Selenipedium × calurum is not easily classified using traditional taxonomic methods. Its classification is often based on its physical characteristics and the parent species involved in its creation. This orchid is considered to be a rare and exotic variety within the Orchidaceae family.

The plant is rich in health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems.
